top_left: I sit where the sun rises and the ceiling is closest — the first page of a book, the corner where reading begins.
top_right: I'm as high as my neighbor to the left, but as far as the corner across from me — where the first line ends before the eye drops down.
bottom_left: I'm as low as the corner across from me, but as near as the one above me — where the very last line begins.
bottom_right: I sit low and far — the last word on the last page.
